theme: Jarayonlar, signallar, systemd servislar, journald loglar

tasks.title: Jarayonlarni sanab hujjatla
tasks.why: Serverda nima ishlayotganini bilish — birinchi diagnostika qadami.
steps: Ishlab turgan jarayonlar SONINI yoz:  ps aux | wc -l > procs.txt

tasks.title: Fon jarayonini ishga tushir
tasks.why: Uzoq ishlarni fonda (&) yuritish — kunlik ko'nikma.
steps: Orqa fonda 500 soniyalik jarayon boshla:  sleep 500 &

tasks.title: PID ni topib yoz
tasks.why: Jarayonni boshqarish uchun avval uning PID (raqam) ini bilish kerak.
steps: PID ni (faqat raqam) work/pid.txt ga yoz

tasks.title: Jarayonni to'xtat
tasks.why: Runaway yoki keraksiz jarayonni to'xtatish — kill bilan.

tasks.title: Servis holatini hujjatla
tasks.why: systemd servisi tirikmi-yo'qmi tekshirish — SRE ishining yuragi.
steps: devops-quizbot servisi holatini ol:  systemctl is-active devops-quizbot

tasks.title: BOSS — 'Signal' (guardian + SIGUSR1)
tasks.why: Jarayon + signal mahoratini sinash: fonda ishga tushir, PID top, SIGUSR1 yubor.

tasks.title: Tushuntirib ber
steps: SIGTERM (15) va SIGKILL (9) farqini + qachon qaysi birini ishlatishni ustozga ayt
